title: Dear You
synopsis: When Xiaowei secretly travels to Thailand to find his supposedly wealthy grandfather, he uncovers a family-shattering secret: his grandfather passed away fifty years ago. For decades, the moving love letters that sustained his grandmother Shurou’s hopes were written by a complete stranger. This unexpected investigation unveils a breathtaking, half-century-old romance that deeply shakes the grandmother's heart.

synopsis_lang.en: When Xiaowei secretly travels to Thailand to find his supposedly wealthy grandfather, he uncovers a family-shattering secret: his grandfather passed away fifty years ago. For decades, the moving love letters that sustained his grandmother Shurou’s hopes were written by a complete stranger. This unexpected investigation unveils a breathtaking, half-century-old romance that deeply shakes the grandmother's heart.
synopsis_lang.zh_hk: 潮汕阿嬤葉淑柔一直守著平淡的日子，安享晚年。孫子曉偉因債務纏身，瞞著家人遠赴泰國，尋找傳聞中的億萬富豪阿公鄭木生。然而，曉偉最後卻帶回了一個震驚整個家族的消息：阿公早已不在人世，那個與阿嬤一直在書信中談情說愛的，竟是一個陌生人。隨著曉偉的調查，一段隱藏了半世紀的感情赫然襲來，擊中了阿嬤的心。

cast: Li Sitong, Wang Yantong, Wu Shaoqing, Zheng Runqi, Wang Xiaohui

cast_lang.en: Li Sitong, Wang Yantong, Wu Shaoqing, Zheng Runqi, Wang Xiaohui
cast_lang.zh_hk: 李思潼、王彥桐、吳少卿、鄭潤奇、王曉慧

subtitle: Chinese,English
